pericopes.pericopeTitle: PAST FAVORS RECALLEDALL ISRAEL BOUND TO THE COVENANTWARNING AGAINST IDOLATRY;PUNISHMENT FOR INFIDELITY

entries.author: Origen of Alexandria
entries.title: SCRIPTURE USES ANTHROPOMORPHISMS.
entries.body: He pretends then that he does not see your future so that he may preserve your self-determination by not foretelling or foreknowing whether you will repent or not. So he says to the prophet, Speak, perhaps they will repent. You will find numerous other passages where Scripture talks about God taking on the manners of man. If you hear of the anger of God and his wrath, do not suppose that anger and wrath are passions of God. The purposes of using this way of speaking are for converting and educating the infant, since we also use a fearful expression with children, not from an actual state of mind but because of a purpose to cause fear. {fn:0}
